analysis_result: Using HALLMARK KRAS_Signaling_Up as the closest public proxy for the paper's 'RAS Pathway Downstream of NF1' gene set, GSEA prerank on MPNST-G1 vs MPNST-G2 (contrast: G1 minus G2 via Welch t-statistic) yielded: KRAS_Signaling_Up NES=-1.244, FDR q-value=0.2361, nominal p=0.0901 (direction: upregulated in MPNST-G2). For completeness, KRAS_Signaling_Dn NES=1.294, FDR q=0.0992. Interpretation: the RAS/KRAS-up signature is enriched in MPNST-G2 relative to MPNST-G1 (negative NES in the G1-vs-G2 contrast), though the enrichment is not significant at FDR < 0.25 in this public-proxy analysis.
denominator_used: N = 12 MPNST tumor RNA-seq samples (MPNST-G1 n=6: M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M803; MPNST-G2 n=6: M1677, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413). Note: clinical data lists 6 G1 and 7 G2 with RNA-seq, but M1933 (G2) was not present in GSE207400_Matrix.txt.gz columns so was excluded.
assumptions_made: Used HALLMARK_KRAS_SIGNALING_UP/DN as the closest public MSigDB proxy for the paper's custom 'RAS Pathway Downstream of NF1' gene set (paper's custom gene set not available in public MSigDB libraries); Used MSigDB_Hallmark_2020 library via gseapy Enrichr endpoint (50 hallmark gene sets total); Ranked genes by Welch two-sample t-statistic on log-normalized expression (G1 vs G2; positive = higher in G1); Used gseapy prerank with min_size=5, max_size=2000, permutation_num=1000, seed=42; Mapped samples by Tumor_ID (M-prefix); one G2 sample (M1933/RT1933) not found in expression matrix columns and was dropped; FDR reported is BH-adjusted q-value across all 50 Hallmark gene sets from the permutation procedure.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - Clinical data: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx, 'Clinical Data' sheet, 108 tumors x 15 columns.
   - Bulk RNA-seq matrix: GSE207400_Matrix.txt.gz, 14,995 genes x 48 samples (log-normalized).

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter: Methylation_Group in ('MPNST_G1', 'MPNST_G2') AND RNA-Seq == 'X' -> 6 + 7 = 13 samples.
   - Filter: Tumor_ID present as a column in expression matrix -> 6 G1 + 6 G2 = 12 samples (M1933/RT1933 missing).
   - Final: MPNST-G1 (n=6): M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M803; MPNST-G2 (n=6): M1677, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Group variable: Methylation_Group (categorical, two levels MPNST_G1 vs MPNST_G2).
   - Gene-level metric for ranking: Welch's two-sample t-statistic (G1 vs G2; positive = higher expression in G1).
   - Gene set library: MSigDB_Hallmark_2020 via gseapy Enrichr endpoint.
   - Proxy gene set: HALLMARK_KRAS_SIGNALING_UP (the paper's custom 'RAS Pathway Downstream of NF1' is not in public MSigDB; KRAS_SIGNALING_UP is the closest canonical RAS/MAPK-downstream proxy).

D. COMPUTATION
   - Per-gene Welch's t-test across all 14,995 genes (scipy.stats.ttest_ind, equal_var=False).
   - Ranked list fed to gseapy.prerank with gene_sets='MSigDB_Hallmark_2020', min_size=5, max_size=2000, permutation_num=1000, seed=42.

E. RESULT
   - HALLMARK_KRAS_SIGNALING_UP: NES = -1.2443; FDR q-value = 0.2361; NOM p-value = 0.0901; ES = -0.2774.
     Direction: upregulated in MPNST-G2 (negative NES in the G1 vs G2 contrast indicates enrichment in G2).
     Leading-edge genes: ST6GAL1;EVI5;TRAF1;RBM4;CSF2RA;SCN1B;MAP4K1;CBL;KCNN4;DOCK2;CAB39L;CCSER2;ITGB2;IL10RA;LAPTM5;ENG;LAT2;CTSS;IL2RG;CBR4;MAP3K1;GALNT3;SATB1;BIRC3;ANXA10;ADAMDEC1;IKZF1;ADAM17;TNFRSF1B;IL7R;HKDC1;PDCD1LG2;BTC;PLAT;ANKH;GPRC5B;MTMR10;IRF8;TLR8;IL1RL2;ADAM8;CDADC1
   - HALLMARK_KRAS_SIGNALING_DN (for reference): NES = 1.2938; FDR q-value = 0.0992; direction: upregulated in MPNST-G1.

F. CAVEATS
   - HALLMARK_KRAS_SIGNALING_UP is a public proxy; the paper likely used a curated NF1-downstream MAPK gene set (e.g., from Wu et al. or their own curation) that is not a publicly indexable MSigDB term. Expect only qualitative agreement on direction; exact NES/FDR magnitudes will differ.
   - Small sample sizes (n=6 per group) limit permutation-based FDR precision.
   - 0.01% duplicated ranking values (ties) in the preranked list.
   - One G2 sample (M1933/RT1933) excluded due to absence from expression matrix; this could shift GSEA statistics modestly relative to the paper's analysis if they included that sample.
